tip.chin_resting: Bring your hands down to the desk
tip.slouching: Straighten your back and open your chest
tip.monitor_too_close: Move a hand's width farther from the screen

cumulative.forward_head: Forward head has been frequent in the last 30 min. Try consciously tucking your chin.
cumulative.chin_resting: Chin resting has been frequent in the last 30 min. Try keeping your hands on the desk.
cumulative.shoulder_tilt: Shoulder tilt has been frequent in the last 30 min. Recheck your monitor position.
cumulative.slouching: Slouching has been frequent in the last 30 min. Sit back deep into your chair.
cumulative.monitor_too_close: Sitting too close has been frequent in the last 30 min. Move a hand's width farther.
cumulative.shoulder_asymmetry: Left-right asymmetry has been frequent in the last 30 min. Tidy up both sides of your desk.
cumulative.head_roll: Head tilt has been frequent in the last 30 min. Check your secondary monitor alignment.

break.micro: Shrug your shoulders, rotate your neck, breathe deeply for 10s
break.standup: Walk for 1 min or do some light stretching
break.deep: 5 min break. A glass of water + look out the window (20-20-20)
